message:
✨ Auto-failover, vanity names, EPG call-sign matching, adaptive buffering (#64)

- Add StreamAlternativesService with EPG-based alternative stream index
- Add StreamHealthTracker for per-stream health scoring with persistence
- Wire auto-failover into PlayerService (2s monitor, triggers after 6s critical)
- Add vanity name system: rename channels without changing DB, both names searchable
- Add rename channel button in fullscreen player controls (pencil icon)
- Failover priority: vanity name > tvgId > EPG+call-sign > normalized name > fuzzy
- Local affiliates (ABC/CBS/NBC/FOX) require matching call signs for failover
  (WABC≠WLS even though both map to ABC EPG)
- Improve EPG auto-mapper: extract call signs from compound tvgIds and channel names
- Differentiate buffer tiers: fast(60s readahead), normal(120s), aggressive(180s+pause)
- Add weather zipcode settings with geocoding and auto-detect
- Keep control bar visible while hovering sparkline tooltips
- Buffer/FPS sparkline shows current value when < 2 data points

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
